title: acer pilosum var. pilosum
intro: Acer pilosum var. pilosum, also known as Downy Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Acer pilosum var. pilosum include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and topical ointments for medicinal purposes.
